title: Nutrition Labelling Online Course - Canada.ca
content:
## Nutrition Labelling Online Course
Explore exciting updates to the course including a highly anticipated module on the new front-of-package labelling, revisions to reflect recent regulatory changes and enhanced accessibility!
Today's food environment can make it challenging for Canadians to make healthier food choices, but using labels can help. To improve understanding of food labels, Health Canada's Food and Nutrition Directorate developed the Nutrition Labelling Online Course . While this free course was developed for health professionals and educators, anyone interested in nutrition labelling will find it valuable.
Completing this course will increase your understanding of the latest nutrition labelling information. Further, if your work involves nutrition education, you can use this updated information to share with Canadians.
Course topics include:
- Food labelling in Canada
- Nutrition facts table
- Front-of-package nutrition symbol
The course is self-paced and takes about three hours to complete. It's filled with interactive content, quizzes, and resources. Upon successful completion of the course, you will receive a Certificate of Achievement!
Take the Nutrition Labelling Online Course today.
Need more information?
For enquiries related to this  course,  please  contact nut.labelling-etiquetage@hc-sc.gc.ca with  the subject line: Nutrition Labelling Online Course.
